g.onclick: sendPrompt('What shape is the video input to SignModel?')
sendPrompt('What does the I3D backbone produce?')
sendPrompt('What does the ProjectionHead do to the backbone features?')
sendPrompt('What is the predicted embedding used for at training and inference?')
sendPrompt('Where do the Word2Vec target embeddings come from?')
sendPrompt('How is the cosine loss calculated?')
sendPrompt('How does in-batch hard negative mining work in the triplet loss?')
sendPrompt('How are cosine loss and triplet loss combined?')
sendPrompt('How is the class embedding matrix built for inference?')
sendPrompt('How does nearest-neighbour lookup work at inference?')
sendPrompt('What does the top-k prediction output look like?')
